---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve GhostHID
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Hardware Version:** (e.g., Pi Zero or Pi Zero 2 W)
**Host OS:** (e.g., Windows 10, Windows 11, macOS)
**Remote Client:** (e.g., Citrix, VMWare, Teams)

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what is happening.

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened (e.g., "The mouse should move but it stayed still").

**Screenshots/Logs**
If applicable, add any error messages from the GhostHID_Installer.
